title: UNESCO World Heritage Knowledge Graph and Pipeline
description: A five-star, FAIR-oriented RDF knowledge graph of the UNESCO World Heritage sites, derived from the official World Heritage Centre syndication export, together with the reproducible pipeline that builds it: extraction, cleaning, reconciliation to Wikidata, the Getty Thesaurus of Geographic Names and the UNESCO Thesaurus, MAP-driven RDF generation, and SHACL validation. Accompanies the paper 'Building an Interoperable Knowledge Graph of the UNESCO World Heritage Sites'.
